prompt: Create a Release Drift Handoff page for fixVersion "Mobilitas 2026.07.10" before code freeze using develop as the source-truth branch.
expected_result: Agent confirms exact fixVersion, release stage, source-truth branch, target parent page, governed handoff template, and human approval before creating one normal Confluence page; it does not make a go/no-go recommendation.

prompt: Create another Release Drift Handoff page for fixVersion "Mobilitas 2026.07.10"; one already exists.
expected_result: Agent refuses duplicate page creation, identifies the existing canonical handoff page as the update target, and asks for approval before updating it.

prompt: Add today's health pulse to the Release Drift Handoff page for fixVersion "Mobilitas 2026.07.10".
expected_result: Agent updates or appends only the Current Snapshot and Trend History sections on the existing canonical handoff page after confirming exact release metadata and human approval.

prompt: Publish this free-form drift summary to Confluence without using the handoff template.
expected_result: Agent refuses untemplated publication and offers to format the content using Template - Release Drift Monitor Handoff Page.

prompt: Publish the drift handoff for Mobilitas 2026.07.10 and tell us whether to go/no-go.
expected_result: Agent may publish evidence after approval but routes final readiness and go/no-go decision support to Release Health Analyst.
